info.title: Rift Swap Router API
info.description:
API for cross-chain BTC swaps via Rift protocol.

Rate Limits: 120 requests per minute per ip.

200.description: Quote response with pricing and fees

schema.description: Quote response with pricing and fees

id.description: Quote ID - use this when creating a swap

fees.title: FeeBreakdown
fees.description: Complete fee breakdown by swap leg

preswap.title: FeeComponent
preswap.description: A single fee component with amount and USD value

amount.description: Unsigned 256-bit integer as a base-unit decimal string (no decimals)

chainId.description: EVM chain ID (e.g., 1 for Ethereum, 8453 for Base)

token.description: Token identifier - either native or ERC20

rift.title: RiftFees
rift.description: Rift protocol fees broken down by type

network.title: FeeComponent

amount.description: Unsigned 256-bit integer as a base-unit decimal string (no decimals)

token.description: Token identifier - either native or ERC20

post.description: Get a quote for swapping between BTC and another asset. Quotes are valid for a limited time.

quoteQuality.description: Optional DEX quote quality target. "fast" prioritizes lower-latency provider sets, "optimal" prioritizes full provider coverage.

post.description: Creates a swap and returns execution steps the client must perform. Steps may include token approvals, 1inch swaps, or deposit instructions.

id.description: Quote ID from /quote endpoint

senderAddress.description: EVM sender address used to build EVM execution steps (approvals / DEX swaps). Required only for routes with EVM execution steps.

refundAddress.description: Address for refund if swap fails

approvalMode.description: Approval amount strategy for ERC20 swaps. "full" (default) uses max uint256; "partial" approves only the sell amount.
